issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The effect checks if the Leader has {Revolutionary Army} type, not if a card is on board.
Condition parameter should be 'type' not 'name'. Format: {"type":"LeaderHasType","value":"Revolutionary Army"}
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text says 'during this turn' which indicates the effect lasts for the remainder of your turn, not until end of turn.
Target should specify 'up to 1' limit. Consider using 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' with a count limit of 1.
